# Teridox
> Teridox is a software house based in Bali, Indonesia, specializing in web development, mobile app development, and SaaS solutions for businesses across Indonesia and Southeast Asia. Operating since 2024.

## Services
- Web Development (/en/services/web-development): High-performance websites and web apps built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript
- Mobile App Development (/en/services/mobile-development): Native iOS & Android apps using Flutter and React Native
- SaaS Development (/en/services/saas-development): Scalable multi-tenant SaaS platforms and business software
- AI Integration (/en/services/ai-integration): AI-powered features, chatbots, and automation using LLMs

## Key Pages
- Home: /en
- Services: /en/services
- Portfolio: /en/portfolio
- Blog: /en/blog
- Contact: /en/contact
- FAQ: /en/faq
- Testimonials: /en/testimonials
- Submit Testimonial: /en/testimonials

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: Next.js 16, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Mobile: Flutter, React Native
- Backend: Node.js, Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- AI: NVIDIA NIM (LLaMA 3.1), Claude API
- Cloud: Vercel, Supabase
- CMS: Custom admin panel built in-house

## Company Information
- Name: Teridox
- Type: Software House
- Operating since: 2024
- Location: Bali, Indonesia
- Projects completed: 50+
- Client satisfaction: 98%
- Languages: Indonesian, English

## Specializations
Teridox helps Indonesian and Southeast Asian businesses build modern digital products. Core strengths are Next.js web apps, React Native mobile apps, SaaS platform development, and AI-powered features integrated into business workflows. All projects are built with bilingual (Indonesian + English) support as standard.

## Content
- Blog: Articles on web development, mobile apps, SaaS, and software technology in Indonesian and English
- Portfolio: Case studies of completed projects across web, mobile, and software categories
